question: The hazardous waste manifest should be:
canonical_answer:
a. Stored in the glove compartment
b. Kept with the driver at all times
c. The same as all other paper work
d. Tabbed differently and kept on top of all other paperwork

D

appears_in.title: Cdl Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: tabbed differently and kept on top of all other paperwork
